hero.title: Packers & Movers in Nagpur
hero.subtitle: Dharampeth to Wardha Road, Sadar to Kalamna — 520+ verified movers in Orange City.

intro: Nagpur, at the geographic centre of India, is a growing hub for logistics, IT, and government. Radhe packers and movers's 520+ verified vendors cover the entire city — from Civil Lines bungalows to new high-rises along Wardha Road and the MIHAN corridor.
whyUs: Nagpur's MIHAN SEZ and Butibori industrial zone attract executive relocations. Our vendors are experienced with both household and corporate moves for clients in these areas.

faqs.q: Do you cover the MIHAN corridor?
faqs.a: Yes — MIHAN SEZ, Wardha Road, and Butibori are all within our service area.

faqs.q: What does a 2 BHK local move cost?
faqs.a: ₹7,000 – ₹13,000 in Nagpur. Exact quote depends on locality and packing.

faqs.q: Do you move to Mumbai and Hyderabad?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves are available with full GPS tracking and ₹5L insurance.
